SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2020 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR BERNARD JAMES BRADY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR CARL CHILDS IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR INFORMS THAT COURT THAT HE WAS SERVED JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC RE: BANKRUPTCY. IT IS NOTED BY COURT THAT WITHIN THE PAPERS OF THE NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY, THE BANKRUPTCY PETITION HAS BEEN DENIED. COURT ADVISES JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO CONTACT JUDGMENT DEBTORS ATTORNEY TO FIND OUT ABOUT THE STATUS OF JUDGMENT DEBTORS BANKRUPTCY PETITION AND TO INFORM HIS ATTORNEY OF THE PENINDG SMALL CLAIMS MATTER RE: THE OEX HEARING DATE OF 10-22-20. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR AT THE NEXT HEARING A BENCH WARRANT WILL BE ISSUED AND BAIL WILL BE SET AT $500.00. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
